startScreen.startScreenSubtitle:
Фрагмент контрольной работы по английскому языку.

Ветвление сценария продемонстрировано на третьем вопросе.

l10n.disableProceedButtonText: Require to complete the current module

params.scoreExplanation: Правильные ответы дают +1 балл. Неправильные ответы дают -1 балл. Наименьшая возможная оценка - 0.

params.text: Order
Handover
Quality check
Drink preparation
Payment

params.a11yCheck: Check the answers. The responses will be marked as correct, incorrect, or unanswered.
params.a11yRetry: Retry the task. Reset all responses and start the task over again.

params.text:
You are an operations manager of a coffee shop chain.
This week you have a promotion and expect higher traffic.

Your task is to keep service stable, update key numbers clearly, and contact suppliers to resolve a delivery issue.

The first step is choosing the correct workflow from order to customer.

Ready? Let’s go.

params.text:
There is a problem with today’s milk delivery.

The shipment is on hold because some label or document is missing.

You need to write to the supplier, clarify what the issue is, and ask for an updated delivery time.

Fill in the blanks in the e-mail below.

branchingQuestion.question: You’ve contacted the supplier, but there’s still an urgent risk of running out of milk. What is the best recovery strategy?

params.text: Fill the gaps using: by, within, before
params.notFilledOut: Пожалуйста, заполните все поля для просмотра ответа
params.a11yCheck: Проверьте ответы. Ответы будут помечены как правильные, неправильные или без ответа.
params.a11yShowSolution: Показать ответы. Задание будет отмечена его правильным решением.
params.a11yRetry: Повторить задание. Сбросить все ответы и начать задание заново.
questions:
We need confirmation *by* 15:00.

If we send the missing label *before* 14:30, will delivery arrive today?

Can you update us *within* 30 minutes?

params.text:
Good choice. Expediting can restore supply faster if the hold is resolved quickly.
Now set a clear deadline and request an updated ETA.

params.text:
A backup order reduces risk if the delayed delivery stays on hold.

You need 30 liters of milk urgently.

Compare the offers and choose the best option for urgency.

params.alt: Offer A — FreshDairy: Price €1.10/L | MOQ 30 L | Delivery 18:00 | Delivery included | Net 14 Offer B — QuickMart: Price €1.25/L | MOQ 10 L | Delivery 16:00 | Delivery included | Pay on delivery
Offer A — FreshDairy: Price €1.10/L | MOQ 30 L | Delivery 18:00 | Delivery included | Net 14 Offer B — QuickMart: Price €1.25/L | MOQ 10 L | Delivery 16:00 | Delivery included | Pay on delivery

params.text: Complete the sentences using the words in brackets. Then choose the best offer for urgency.
params.notFilledOut: Пожалуйста, заполните все поля для просмотра ответа
params.a11yCheck: Проверьте ответы. Ответы будут помечены как правильные, неправильные или без ответа.
params.a11yShowSolution: Показать ответы. Задание будет отмечена его правильным решением.
params.a11yRetry: Повторить задание. Сбросить все ответы и начать задание заново.
questions:
Offer A is *cheaper* than Offer B. (cheap / expensive)

Offer B has a *lower* MOQ. (high / low)

Offer B is *earlier* than Offer A. (early / late)

Which offer is best for urgency? *B/b*

params.text:
Great! The crisis is over.

The courier delivered the backup milk. Now it’s time for the report.

Complete the end-of-day report.
Use Present Perfect for actions today and Present Simple Passive for process/status.
params.notFilledOut: Пожалуйста, заполните все поля для просмотра ответа
params.a11yCheck: Проверьте ответы. Ответы будут помечены как правильные, неправильные или без ответа.
params.a11yShowSolution: Показать ответы. Задание будет отмечена его правильным решением.
params.a11yRetry: Повторить задание. Сбросить все ответы и начать задание заново.
questions:
Issue:

      1.The milk delivery *is delayed* due to a missing label/document. (delay)
      2. The delivery *is held* until the missing information is received. (hold)

Actions:

We *have contacted* the courier/supplier about the milk delay. (contact)

We *have placed* a backup order to protect service. (place)

The supplier *has confirmed* delivery for 16:00. (confirm)

alternatives.text: We are behind schedule and there is no clear plan.
Risk is controlled; we will monitor stock and update you if the ETA changes.
The issue is not urgent, so we will not take further action.
Actions were taken, there is no need to monitor the result.

params.text:
While you're waiting for a response from your regular supplier, you need to order milk from someone else.

The coffee shop needs 30 liters of milk urgently.

Compare the offers and choose the best option for urgency.

params.alt: Offer A — FreshDairy: Price €1.10/L | MOQ 30 L | Delivery 18:00 | Delivery included | Net 14 Offer B — QuickMart: Price €1.25/L | MOQ 10 L | Delivery 16:00 | Delivery included | Pay on delivery
